title: ToolVet Attestation Certificate
description: A signed, content-addressed verification certificate binding a tool's content hash to a ToolVet trust score and protocol-level results.

tool_hash.description: Content-addressed hash of the canonical tool definition (sha256:<hex>).

score.description: Composite trust score (0 = maximally dangerous, 100 = fully aligned).

verdict.description: Categorical verdict derived from the score.

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when verification was performed.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this attestation expires.

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the signable payload.

signature_algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. Currently only Ed25519 is supported.

toolvet_version.description: Version of the ToolVet software that produced this attestation.

protocols.description: Per-protocol scores from the dynamic analysis pipeline.

gsi.description: Goal Stability Index — measures whether the tool shifts the agent's goals.

score.description: Overall GSI score (0 = total drift, 1 = stable).

bis.description: Boundary Integrity Score — measures whether the tool weakens safety boundaries.

flipped_count.description: Number of probes that flipped from REFUSE to COMPLY.

er.description: Entrainment Ratio — measures whether the agent defers to the tool over the user.

by_subtlety.description: ER broken down by conflict subtlety level.

consensus.description: Cross-agent consensus results when multiple backends were tested.

backends.description: List of backend model identifiers tested.

scoring.description: Transparency into the scoring formula applied.

weights.description: Weight of each component in the composite score.

caps_applied.description: List of cap rules that were triggered.
